sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — CR 25-16: Fishing Seasons and Regulations, January 1, 2026 – December 31, 2027
sources.quotedText: Comins Lake: Open year around. Daily: 5 trout and 5 black bass. No limit on northern pike (unlimited possession). Possession: 10 trout and 10 black bass. Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Comins Lake — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Comins Lake is located 10 miles southeast of Ely, Nevada... Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout, and Tiger Trout are stocked into Comins Lake on an annual basis... Largemouth bass are self-sustaining. Northern Pike are an aquatic invasive species that negatively impact the Comins Lake fishery; NDOW encourages anglers to remove all pike caught.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.humanSummary: Comins Lake is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: Daily limit is 5 trout and 5 black bass. Possession limit is 10 trout and 10 black bass. Northern pike have no daily or possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit: 5 trout and 5 black bass. Possession limit: 10 trout and 10 black bass.
regulations.verbatimText: Limits — Daily: 5 trout and 5 black bass. No limit on northern pike (unlimited possession). Possession: 10 trout and 10 black bass.

parameters.counting_rule: No daily or possession limit on northern pike at Comins Lake; NDOW encourages harvest of all pike caught, as the species is an invasive predator that has been chemically removed twice (1989 and 2015) to protect the trout/bass fishery.

regulations.humanSummary: No limit on northern pike at Comins Lake — unlimited daily take and possession.
regulations.verbatimText: No limit on northern pike (unlimited possession).

parameters.note: No hour-of-day restriction; fishing permitted any hour of the day or night.

regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is permitted any hour of the day or night.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
